reason: No active canonical frontier_research item existed; additive queue history showed R-005 through R-008 completed, so this records the next non-duplicative slice without overwriting shared state.

proposed_item.action: Distinguish historical user interaction from live transient activation at the exact browser audio invocation.

progress.finding: A prior click or sticky activation does not establish that transient activation remained live when resume or play was invoked. Capture activation twice: synchronously at handler entry and at the exact audio call.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files.

proposed_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should snapshot navigator.userActivation.isActive and hasBeenActive at direct-handler entry and snapshot isActive again immediately before resume/play. Feed the result into R-008 evidence fusion; live activation plus a resolved call still must not be reported as audible without route and physical evidence.
